title: Senior Product Manager
description: Own the product strategy for our demand response platform. Lead cross-functional teams to build 0-to-1 features for utility partners. You will define the roadmap for our DER orchestration products.

title: Staff Product Manager - VPP Platform
description: Lead product strategy for our virtual power plant aggregation platform. Own roadmap from ideation to launch across demand response, grid services, and market participation.

title: Junior Product Manager
description: Entry level PM role supporting our energy marketplace product team.

title: Associate Product Manager
description: APM program for recent graduates. Rotational product role.

title: Senior Product Manager
description: Lead product for our revenue cycle automation platform. Healthcare experience required. FDA regulatory knowledge preferred.

title: Director of Product Management
description: Lead commercialization of our utility-scale generation portfolio. Negotiate PPAs and offtake agreements with utility counterparties. Manage EPC contractors and oversee project finance for grid-scale assets. Technoeconomic modeling required.

title: Senior Product Manager - Flight Connectivity
description: Own the flight connectivity product at Hopper, a consumer travel app.

title: Senior Product Manager - Flight Connectivity
description: Own the flight connectivity product at Hopper, a consumer travel app.

title: Product Manager - On-site New York Only
description: Must be located in New York only. No remote. Join our commodities trading software team.

title: Head of Product
description: Be our founding product leader. Define product strategy for our DER API platform. You will be our first PM hire, building the function from scratch.
